heading: Applicability to national security systems
label: 11103 Applicability to national security systems

children.label: B
children.text: involves cryptologic activities related to national security;

children.label: C
children.text: involves command and control of military forces;

children.label: D
children.text: involves equipment that is an integral part of a weapon or weapons system; or

children.label: E
children.text: subject to paragraph (2), is critical to the direct fulfillment of military or intelligence missions.

children.heading: .—Limitation
children.label: 2 .—Limitation
children.text: Paragraph (1)(E) does not include a system to be used for routine administrative and business applications (including payroll, finance, logistics, and personnel management applications).

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: b .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (c), chapter 113 of this title does not apply to national security systems.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Sections 11313, 11315, and 11316 of this title apply to national security systems.

children.heading: .—Capital planning and investment control
children.label: 2 .—Capital planning and investment control
children.text: The heads of executive agencies shall apply sections 11302 and 11312 of this title to national security systems to the extent practicable.

children.heading: Applicability of performance-based and results-based management to national security systems.—
children.label: 3 Applicability of performance-based and results-based management to national security systems.—

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: A .—In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), the heads of executive agencies shall apply to national security systems to the extent practicable.section 11303 of this title

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: B .—Exception
children.text: National security systems are subject to , except for subparagraph (B)(iv).section 11303(b)(5) of this title
